title: X2 Pairs of The Chemical Hut Extra Large Blue Industrial Cleaning and Washing Up Rubber Gloves XL.
features: High quality natural rubber latex washing gloves are perfect for cleaning dishes, general household cleaning, handling food stuffs or gardening.
Manufactured from natural rubber latex and have a cotton flock lining to give a flexible and comfortable wear which offers a high degree of sensitivity.
The palms and finger tips have added textured grip to improve handling in wet conditions.
These glove are also ideal for car valeter's in order to keep hands dry and warm throughout the day and avoid skin reactions from the harsh chemicals used.
